title: Battle of Wayland (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Wayland''' could refer to:

*A [[Battle of Wayland (Mandalorian Wars)|battle]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]
*'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*[[Battle on Wayland]]
:*[[Assault on Mount Tantiss]]

*A Yuuzhan Vong [[Raid on Wayland (25 ABY)|attack]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]
*A New Republic [[Raid on Wayland (28 ABY)|raid]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]
